productDisplayName: Jungle Book Boys Royal White T-shirt
description: Style NoteLet your little man enjoy comfort and style with this polo t-shirt from the jungle book collection. This tee is sure to become a favourite in no time and is a must buy. Team it with shorts and comfy footwear for that uber cool and comfy look.Product DetailsWhite and blue striped polo t-shirt that has a blue collar, short sleeves, graphic and rubber print on the left chest, short buttoned placket, stitch detailing and brand badge above the left hemMaterial and Care100% CottonHand wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededLine dryCool iron do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
